name: inventory-persistence
description: Validate fist ownership and pet inventory survive rebirth while equipped fist state resets.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation") c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Coins=1000}) local fist=c:Invoke("BuyFist","Boxing Glove") local pet=c:Invoke("HatchPet") c:Invoke("SetStats",{WallLevel=55,Coins=1000000}) local rebirth=c:Invoke("Rebirth") local owned=H:JSONDecode(rebirth.OwnedFistsJSON) local inventory=H:JSONDecode(rebirth.PetInventoryJSON) local equippedPets=H:JSONDecode(rebirth.EquippedPetsJSON) local reEquip=c:Invoke("EquipFist","Boxing Glove") return H:JSONEncode({fistBought=fist.ok,petHatched=pet.ok,rebirth=rebirth.ok,ownsBoxing=table.find(owned,"Boxing Glove")~=nil,petCount=#inventory,equippedPetCount=#equippedPets,resetFist=rebirth.EquippedFist=="Starter Glove",reEquip=reEquip.ok})
